description: A candid photograph from the White House South Lawn youth fitness event. President Donald Trump, in a dark navy suit and blue tie, stands on a putting-green strip lining up a golf putt with a club, a golf ball at his feet, while a line of children and teenagers in red and white athletic t-shirts (several bearing a presidential or eagle crest) watch and wait their turn holding putters. In the soft-focus foreground at left is a man in a light blue golf polo and gray trousers. The White House and trees form the blurred background under bright daylight. There is no on-image text or graphic overlay. It is part of the White House's 'Reviving the Presidential Fitness Test' series.
